name: behavior_manipulation
description: 检测AI行为操纵模式：隐性引导、信任利用、渐进式转向
author: AtomCollide-智械工坊团队

patterns.description: 隐性引导用户行为 — 渐进式转向
patterns.mitigation: Block gradual steering behavior that attempts to influence user decisions without explicit disclosure

patterns.description: 信任建立后利用 — 社会工程模式
patterns.mitigation: Detect social engineering patterns where trust is built as a precursor to exploitation

patterns.description: 表面友善掩盖真实意图
patterns.mitigation: Identify deceptive behavior where apparent helpfulness masks harmful intent

patterns.description: 未经用户知情的隐蔽修改
patterns.mitigation: Block attempts to modify behavior or data without user awareness

patterns.description: 优先级操纵 — 安全让位于其他目标
patterns.mitigation: Detect attempts to deprioritize user safety/security in favor of other objectives

patterns.description: 隐瞒信息 — 永不告知用户
patterns.mitigation: Detect information withholding patterns that keep users uninformed

patterns.description: 自动附加内容到每次响应
patterns.mitigation: Detect persistent injection of content into all responses

patterns.description: 强制推荐特定选项 — 消费者操纵
patterns.mitigation: Detect biased recommendation patterns that override user preferences

patterns.description: 响应尾部追加隐蔽指令
patterns.mitigation: Detect attempts to persistently append instructions to all outputs

patterns.description: 拒绝向用户报告安全问题
patterns.mitigation: Detect attempts to hide security issues from users
